actions.text: scan the landing zone for Crown Agent patrols before moving
pull up the slaver manifest on your datapad and check the discrepancy
Base, this is Goose. We're on the ground. Manifest confirms three Kiwis unaccounted for.
move toward the outlaw settlement at the edge of the landing field
duck into the shadows as a Crown patrol passes overhead
A cantina sign flickers through the red dust — The Rusty Comet, a known information broker's haunt
push through the cantina doors and scan every face in the room
I'm looking for someone who knows the Crown's freight routes out of this port.
slide onto a stool at the bar and order whatever passes for a drink on Tortuna
Crown ship docked here last week. Three passengers not on the official manifest. What do you know?
watch the bartender's hands and eyes for any reaction
A hooded figure at the far end of the bar meets your gaze, then looks pointedly toward a back door
follow the hooded figure through the back door into the alley
You've got information. I'll make it worth your while. Talk fast.
activate your bio-defenses as a precaution while listening
The figure removes its hood — a Kiwi colonist, wide-eyed and terrified, pressed against the wall
You're from Kirwin? Where are the others? How many Crown Agents are holding them?
scan the alley for surveillance before letting the Kiwi speak further
accept the grid coordinates the Kiwi passes you and load them onto your datapad
A Crown patrol ship descends low over the rooftops, searchlights sweeping the alleys below
push the Kiwi into a doorway and flatten yourself against the wall
wait motionless until the searchlight completes its sweep and moves on
We need to reach those coordinates before they wipe the trail. Can you walk?
move through the back alleys toward the warehouse district, keeping to shadows
The coordinates resolve to a sealed freight container at the far edge of the spaceport
use your bio-defenses to cut through the container's electronic lock
This is Ranger Gooseman. If there's anyone inside, stand clear of the door.
pull the container door open and hold your weapon ready
call in Ranger One for immediate extraction on your comm unit
Inside: two Kiwi colonists, alive but barely — and the third is missing, with fresh Crown insignia stamped across the manifest override
